case_title: BROADWELL, LLC VS. ERIC KEVER ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF UNAVAILABILITY OF FARMER, AARON ALEKSANDR ON DEC-27-2022 THROUGH JAN-06-2023 (TRANSACTION ID # 68520888) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROADWELL, LLC
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROADWELL, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KEVER, ERIC DOES 1 TO X THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1362 POWELL, UNIT 10 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94133, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY **SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 68828586)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 68872063)
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROADWELL, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT KEVER, ERIC DOES 1 TO X SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 68520888) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROADWELL, LLC
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT KEVER, ERIC DOES 1 TO X
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 68828586) AS TO DEFENDANT KEVER, ERIC DOES 1 TO X
DECLARATION OF AARON FARMER RE FAIR RENTAL VALUE AND ELECTRONIC LEASE ( DAILY RENTAL IS $35 PER DAY )(TRANSACTION ID # 68828586) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROADWELL, LLC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 68828586), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROADWELL, LLC SERVED DEC-16-2022, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO X
